title: Shine of the Silver Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A silver dragon's shine hides a secret that could save the world! 🥈

options.en: An enormous earthquake dragon deep in the earth
options.zh: 深埋地底、能引发地震的巨龙

explain.en: The Naga is a giant dragon with the power of earthquakes who lives deep within the earth.
explain.zh: 那迦是一条拥有地震之力的巨龙，居住在地球深处。

q.en: Why did the wizards make the Silver Key and the Gold Key?
q.zh: 巫师们为什么要打造银钥匙和金钥匙？

explain.en: Wizards of the north and south made the two keys to control the Naga and return him to his home in the earth.
explain.zh: 北方和南方的巫师打造了这两把钥匙，用来控制那迦并把它送回地底的家。

q.en: Which Dragon Masters travel to Gallia to stop Diego?
q.zh: 哪些驯龙师前往加利亚去阻止迭戈？

options.zh: 卡洛斯、迭戈和格里菲斯

explain.en: Griffith sends Drake, Bo, and Carlos because Bo's Water Dragon can cure dark spells and Carlos knows Diego best.
explain.zh: 格里菲斯派德雷克、波和卡洛斯前往，因为波的水龙能解除黑魔法，而卡洛斯最了解迭戈。

q.en: What is special about Bo's dragon Shu?
q.zh: 波的龙舒有什么特别之处？

options.en: She can fly faster than any dragon
Her water can wash away dark spells

explain.en: Shu is a Water Dragon whose healing mist can cure a dragon or person of Maldred's dark spell.
explain.zh: 舒是一条水龙，她治愈性的水雾能治好人或龙身上的马尔德雷德黑魔法。

q.en: Who guards the Silver Key in Gallia?
q.zh: 在加利亚，是谁守护着银钥匙？

explain.en: Jean is the Silver Dragon's Dragon Master and, with Argent, has guarded the Silver Key for a very long time.
explain.zh: 珍是银龙的驯龙师，她和阿真特长久以来一直守护着银钥匙。

q.en: What can Argent the Silver Dragon do with his wings?
q.zh: 银龙阿真特能用翅膀做什么？

options.en: He uses them to fly to the moon
He reflects an opponent's attack back at them
options.zh: 他把敌人的攻击反弹回去

options.en: He hides the key inside them

explain.en: When an enemy attacks, Argent's shining wings bounce the attack right back at the attacker.
explain.zh: 当敌人攻击时，阿真特发光的翅膀会把攻击原样反弹回攻击者身上。

q.en: How does Jean keep the castle safe with so few soldiers?
q.zh: 珍人手这么少，是怎么守住城堡的？

options.en: She uses magic to make an army appear
options.zh: 她用魔法变出一支军队

options.en: She improved catapults to shoot many rocks and look like an army
options.zh: 她改良了投石机，一次射出很多石头，看起来像一支军队

options.en: She asks the villagers to fight

explain.en: Jean's redesigned catapults launch several rocks at once, fooling enemies into thinking many soldiers guard the castle.
explain.zh: 珍重新设计的投石机能一次发射多块石头，让敌人以为城堡里有许多士兵守卫。

q.en: What happens to the Silver Key after Diego is cured?
q.zh: 迭戈被治好之后，银钥匙怎么样了？

options.en: Maldred's red orb steals it away
options.zh: 马尔德雷德的红色法球把它夺走了

explain.en: Just as Diego is healed, a red orb belonging to Maldred appears and carries the Silver Key off with it.
explain.zh: 就在迭戈被治愈时，马尔德雷德的一个红色法球出现，把银钥匙一起带走了。

q.en: Where is the Gold Key hidden, according to Diego?
q.zh: 据迭戈所说，金钥匙藏在哪里？

explain.en: While under Maldred's spell, Diego connected to the wizard's thoughts and learned the Gold Key is on the Island of Suvarna.
explain.zh: 在马尔德雷德的魔咒控制下，迭戈连接到了巫师的思绪，得知金钥匙在苏瓦纳岛上。

q.en: What real historical figure inspired the new Dragon Master Jean?
q.zh: 新驯龙师珍的原型是哪位真实历史人物？

options.zh: 英格兰一位著名的女王

options.en: Joan of Arc, who led an army at age sixteen
options.zh: 圣女贞德，她十六岁时就率领了一支军队

explain.en: The author says Jean was inspired by a real girl who led a French army in 1429 when she was sixteen — Joan of Arc.
explain.zh: 作者说珍的灵感来自一位真实女孩：1429年十六岁时率领法国军队的圣女贞德。
